name: Gongura Pappu
steps: Pressure cook toor dal with gongura leaves, onion, green chillies and turmeric.
Mash well so the tangy leaves blend into the dal; add salt and simmer.
Fry garlic, mustard, cumin and red chillies in hot oil until the garlic turns golden.
Pour the tempering over the pappu and cover for a minute so the aroma settles.
Serve with rice, ghee and a roasted papad.
